name: rudraneel93/mcp-guardian
description: Security, cost, and health governance proxy for MCP infrastructure

tools.name: scan_security
tools.description: Scan MCP server configurations for CVEs, hardcoded secrets, typo-squatting, auth weaknesses, and command injection

tools.name: audit_costs
tools.description: Audit token usage and estimate costs per MCP server

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Check health, latency, and reliability of MCP servers

tools.name: full_report
tools.description: Generate a complete security, cost, and health report for all MCP servers
